description: Natural-language SQL assistant for UNHCR asylum process flows and durable solutions. Covers asylum applications filed (years 2000-2024), decisions reached (recognised, other-protected, rejected, closed; recognition rates), and durable solutions: refugee returns, resettlement to third countries, naturalisation, IDP returns (1959-2024). Built on Spark Delta tables in workspace.hackathon. Source: UNHCR Refugee Data Finder API, CC BY 4.0. Does NOT cover end-year refugee/IDP population stocks or demographic age-sex breakdowns — see the UNHCR Population & Demographics space for those.
sample_questions: How many asylum applications did Germany receive in 2023?
What is the asylum recognition rate in Germany for 2023, broken down by procedure type?
Which countries' applicants have the highest recognition rate in Germany 2023?
How many refugees were resettled globally in 2023?
How many Afghan asylum applications were filed in Europe in 2023, and how many were recognised?
Has the recognition rate for Syrian asylum-seekers in Germany changed over time?
How does government RSD compare to UNHCR RSD in Kenya for 2023?
Show the decision-outcome breakdown for asylum decisions in Germany 2023.
Top 5 origins of asylum applications in the EU, 2015-2024.
